raw_text:
∂ₓ G₁(x,t) = -\frac{1}{2} \frac{2x - 2t}{(1 + x² - 2xt)^{\frac{3}{2}}} = \sum_{l=0}^{\infty} P_l(t) \cdot l x^{l-1},
-(x - t) \cdot G₁^3 = \sum_{l=0}^{\infty} P_l(t) \cdot l x^{l-1},
(x - t) \cdot G₁ = (1 + x² - 2xt) \sum_{l=0}^{\infty} P_l(t) \cdot l x^{l-1} \quad \downarrow l \to l+1,
(x - t) \sum_{l=0}^{\infty} P_l(t) \cdot x^l = (1 + x² - 2xt) \sum_{l=0}^{\infty} P_{l+1}(t)(l+1)x^l,
\sum_{l=0}^{\infty} P_l(t) \cdot x^{l+1} - \sum_{l=0}^{\infty} t P_l(t) \cdot x^l = \sum_{l=0}^{\infty} P_{l+1}(t)(l+1)x^l
\underset{\text{橙色波浪线}}{\underbrace{l \to l-1}} \qquad - \sum_{l=0}^{\infty} 2t P_{l+1}(t)(l+1)x^{l+1} \underset{\text{蓝色波浪线}}{\underbrace{l \to l-1}} + \sum_{l=0}^{\infty} P_{l+1}(t)(l+1)x^{l+2} \underset{\text{红色波浪线}}{\underbrace{l \to l-2}},
\text{有} \sum_{l=1}^{\infty} (P_{l-1}(t) - t P_l(t)) x^l = \sum_{l=1}^{\infty} \left[ P_{l+1}(t)(l+1) - 2t P_l(t) l + P_{l-1}(t)(l-1) \right] x^l,
P_{l-1}(t) - t P_l(t) = P_{l+1}(t)(l+1) - 2t P_l(t) l + P_{l-1}(t)(l-1)
\underset{\text{蓝色三角}}{\triangle} \quad \underset{\text{橙色波浪线}}{\sim} \quad \underset{\text{橙色波浪线}}{\sim} \quad \underset{\text{蓝色三角}}{\triangleright}
\boxed{t(2l+1)P_l = (l+1)P_{l+1} + l P_{l-1}} \quad \text{①} \quad \text{②},
G₁(x,t) = \frac{1}{\sqrt{1 + x² - 2xt}} = \sum_{l=0}^{\infty} P_l(t) \cdot x^l,
\partial_t G₁(x,t) = -\frac{1}{2} \frac{-2x}{(1 + x² - 2xt)^{\frac{3}{2}}} = \sum_{l=0}^{\infty} P_l'(t) \cdot x^l,
x G₁ = (1 + x² - 2xt) \sum_{l=0}^{\infty} P_l'(t) \cdot x^l.

图片为网格纸背景的手写数学推导，内容垂直排列。包含多个数学公式，涉及偏导数、求和符号、分数和指数表达式。公式中使用不同颜色标注：橙色波浪线标注"l→l-1"，蓝色波浪线标注"l→l-1"，红色波浪线标注"l→l-2"。关键公式$t(2l+1)P_l = (l+1)P_{l+1} + l P_{l-1}$被红色方框框住，旁边有"①"和"②"标记。推导过程从生成函数$G_1(x,t)$的偏导开始，逐步展开至勒让德多项式递推关系。
